dataset.description: Configurable parameters to construct the dataset for a DepthNet experiment.

infer_dataset.description: Configurable parameters to construct the infer dataset for a DepthNet experiment.

crop_min_valid_disp_ratio.description: The probability for minimum crop valid disparity ratio
crop_min_valid_disp_ratio.title: The probability for min crop valid disparity ratio

crop_size.description: The crop size for input RGB images [height, width]
crop_size.title: augmentation crop size

do_flip.description: A flag specifying whether to perform flip in data augmentation
do_flip.title: do flip

h_flip_prob.description: The probability for horizontal flip augmentation

hshift_prob.description: The probability for horizontal shift augmentation
hshift_prob.title: The probability for horizontal flip augmentation

input_mean.description: The input mean for RGB frames
input_mean.title: input mean per pixel

input_std.description: The input standard deviation per pixel for RGB frames

The list of data sources for training:
                    * dataset_name : The type of the dataset
                    * data_file : The path of the data file
data_sources.title: train data sources

pin_memory.description:
Flag to enable the dataloader to allocated pagelocked memory for faster
                    of data between the CPU and GPU.
pin_memory.title: pin_memory

workers.description: The number of parallel workers processing data
workers.title: batch size

max_depth.description: The maximum depth in meters in MetricDepthAnythingV2
max_depth.title: max depth in meters

max_disparity.description: The maximum allowed disparity for which we compute losses during training
max_disparity.title: maximum dispairty

min_depth.description: The minimum depth in meters in MetricDepthAnythingV2
min_depth.title: min depth in meters

model.description: Configurable parameters to construct the model for a DepthNet experiment.

corr_levels.description: The number of levels in the correlation pyramid
corr_levels.title: number of correlation pyramid levels

corr_radius.description: The width of the correlation pyramid
corr_radius.title: correlation pyramid width

max_disparity.description: The maximum disparity of the model used in the training of a stereo model
max_disparity.title: max disparity

mixed_precision.description: A flag specifying whether to use mixed precision training
mixed_precision.title: Mixed Precision Training

mono_backbone.description: Network defined paths for Monocular DepthNet Backbone

pretrained_path.description: Path to load depth anything v2 as an encoder for Monocular DepthNet
pretrained_path.title: Pretrained path for mono backbone

use_bn.description: A flag specifying whether to use batch normalization in Monocular DepthNet
use_bn.title: Batch normalization in Monocular DepthNet

use_clstoken.description: A flag specifying whether to use class token
use_clstoken.title: Class token in Monocular DepthNet

mono_backbone.title: Mono backbone configuration

n_gru_layers.description: The number of hidden GRU levels
n_gru_layers.title: number of hidden GRU levels

stereo_backbone.description: Network defined paths for Edgenext and Depthanythingv2

depth_anything_v2_pretrained_path.description: Path to load depth anything v2 as an encoder for Stereo DepthNet (FoundationStereo)

edgenext_pretrained_path.description: Path to load edgenext encoder for Stereo DepthNet (FoundationStereo)

use_bn.description: A flag specifying whether to use batch normalization in DepthAnythingV2
use_bn.title: batch normalization in DepthAnythingV2

use_clstoken.description: A flag specifying whether to use class token
use_clstoken.title: class token in DepthAnythingV2

stereo_backbone.title: Stereo backbone configuration

model_name.description: Name of model if invoking task via :code:`model_agnostic`
model_name.title: Model name

algorithm.description: Calibration/optimization algorithm. Used by ModelOpt backends (modelopt.pytorch and modelopt.onnx). Ignored by torchao backend.
algorithm.title: Calibration algorithm

backend_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the backend
backend_kwargs.title: Backend kwargs

device.description: Device to use for calibration. Accepts 'cuda' (uses default GPU), 'cpu', 'trt' (TensorRT for ONNX backend), or specific GPU device like 'cuda:0', 'cuda:1', etc. If 'cuda' is specified but no GPU is available, the framework will automatically fall back to 'cpu'. Note: 'trt' is only supported by the modelopt.onnx backend for ONNX Runtime with TensorRT execution provider.
device.title: Calibration device

layers.description: List of per-module quantization configurations. Each entry specifies which modules to quantize and their data types. This is the primary way to configure quantization.
layers.title: Layer quantization configs

model_path.description: Path to the model to be quantized. For ONNX backend, path to ONNX file.
model_path.title: Model path

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

skip_names.description: List of module/layer names or patterns to exclude from quantization
skip_names.title: Skip names

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

train.description: Configurable parameters to construct the trainer for a DepthNet experiment.

activation_checkpoint.description:
A True value instructs train to recompute in backward pass to save GPU memory,
        rather than storing activations.
activation_checkpoint.title: enable activation checkpointing

checkpoint_interval.description: The interval (in epochs) at which a checkpoint will be saved. Helps resume training.
checkpoint_interval.title: Checkpoint interval

checkpoint_interval_steps.description: The number of steps to save the checkpoint.
checkpoint_interval_steps.title: checkpoint interval steps

checkpoint_interval_unit.description: The unit of the checkpoint interval.
checkpoint_interval_unit.title: Checkpoint interval unit

clip_grad_norm.description:
Amount to clip the gradient by L2 Norm.
        A value of 0.0 specifies no clipping.
clip_grad_norm.title: clip gradient norm

distributed_strategy.description:
The multi-GPU training strategy.
        DDP (Distributed Data Parallel) and Fully Sharded DDP are supported.
distributed_strategy.title: distributed_strategy

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the training on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in train.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

inference_tile.description:
Use tiled inference, particularly for transformers
                    which expect fixed size of sequences.
inference_tile.title: tile inference

is_dry_run.description:
Whether to run the trainer in Dry Run mode. This serves
        as a good means to validate the spec file and run a sanity check on the trainer
        without actually initializing and running the trainer.
is_dry_run.title: Is dry run

log_every_n_steps.description: Interval steps of logging training results and running validation numbers within 1 epoch
log_every_n_steps.title: log steps

num_epochs.description: Number of epochs to run the training.
num_epochs.title: Number of epochs

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the train job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the training on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

optim.description: Hyper parameters to configure the optimizer.

lr.description: The initial learning rate for training the model, excluding the backbone.
lr.title: learning rate

lr_decay.description: The decreasing factor for the learning rate scheduler.
lr_decay.title: learning rate decay

lr_scheduler.description:
The learning scheduler:
                    * MultiStepLR : Decrease the lr by lr_decay from lr_steps
                    * StepLR : Decrease the lr by lr_decay at every lr_step_size.
lr_scheduler.title: Learning rate scheduler

lr_step_size.description: The number of steps to decrease the learning rate in the StepLR.
lr_step_size.title: learning rate step size

lr_steps.description:
The steps at which the learning rate must be decreased.
                    This is applicable only with the MultiStep LR.
lr_steps.title: learning rate decay steps

min_lr.description: The minimum learning rate value for the learning rate scheduler.
min_lr.title: minimum learning rate

momentum.description: The momentum for the AdamW optimizer.
momentum.title: momentum - AdamW

monitor_name.description: The metric value to be monitored for the :code:`AutoReduce` Scheduler.
monitor_name.title: monitor_name

optimizer.description: Type of optimizer used to train the network.

warmup_steps.description: The number of steps to perform linear learning rate"                     warm-up before engaging a learning rate scheduler
warmup_steps.title: Warm up steps

optim.title: optimizer

precision.description: Precision to run the training on.
precision.title: precision

pretrained_model_path.description: Path to a pre-trained DepthNet model to initialize the current training from.

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

resume_training_checkpoint_path.description: Path to the checkpoint to resume training from.
resume_training_checkpoint_path.title: Resume checkpoint path

seed.description: The seed for the initializer in PyTorch. If < 0, disable fixed seed.
seed.title: Seed for randomization

validation_interval.description:
The interval (in epochs) at which a evaluation
        will be triggered on the validation dataset.
validation_interval.title: Validation interval

wandb.description: Configurable parameters to construct the wandb client for a DepthNet experiment.
